news.t: Trade the Titans: Direxion Debuts New Suite of Leveraged & Inverse ETFs

holdings.infoBox: TSXU is an equity ETF with a total of 19 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Semiconductors Top 5 Bull 2X ETF (TSXU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is passively managed, providing 2x leveraged exposure to an equally-weighted index of the top 5 largest US companies in the semiconductors industry. TSXU was launched on Oct 1, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.
infoTable: NYSE Semiconductor Top 5 Equal Weight Index
